_source: Saudi Census 2022, General Authority for Statistics (GASTAT), https://www.stats.gov.sa/
_note: City-proper population figures, for IMPACT-CONTEXT display only. NOT a model output and NOT an estimate of how many people would actually be exposed to a given hazard (that requires exposure/vulnerability modeling this system does not perform). Provided as reference context only, per WMO Impact-Based Forecast and Warning Services (IBFWS) guidance that warnings should be interpretable in terms of human impact, not just hazard probability.
_jizan_note: Two public figures exist for Jizan city proper (173,919 per citypopulation.de vs 200,911 in another secondary source) -- likely a boundary-definition difference. We use the lower, more conservative figure and disclose the discrepancy.
